ValidationRule.description: The Accounting Period cannot be updated on invoices spanning two different months
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( leaseworks__Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c , leaseworks__Is_Deferred_Rent__c , PRIORVALUE( leaseworks__Accounting_Period__c ) != leaseworks__Accounting_Period__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The accounting period cannot be overridden on a deferred revenue invoice.
